topic.title: Large Topic 1000
topic.shortdesc: Large conservative topic 1000 used for scale testing with a root map and stable relative references.

section.title: Section 01
section.p: Topic 1000 paragraph 001 is conservative filler content for enterprise XML scale testing. It keeps the structure DITA 1.3 friendly while exercising large topic storage, map loading, and downstream processing with stable, readable prose. Each paragraph repeats predictable documentation language so authoring tools can load a topic of approximately one hundred kilobytes without introducing risky markup or broken references.

Each paragraph repeats predictable documentation language so authoring tools can load a topic of approximately one hundred kilobytes without introducing risky markup or broken references.

Each paragraph repeats predictable documentation language so authoring tools can load a topic of approximately one hundred kilobytes without introducing risky markup or broken references.

section.title: Section 27

It keeps the structure DITA 1.3 friendly while exercising large topic storage, map loading, and downstream processing with stable, readable prose. Each paragraph repeats predictable documentation language so authoring tools can load a topic of approximately one hundred kilobytes without introducing risky markup or broken references.
